# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you believe you have found a security vulnerability in optimizerDuck, please do NOT open a public GitHub issue.

Instead, report it privately through our official security page:

👉 https://optimizerduck.vercel.app/docs/contribute/security

That page contains detailed instructions on responsible disclosure, response timelines, and supported versions.

We appreciate responsible disclosure and will respond as quickly as possible.
